title: Laravel12-Vue3-Inertia-Postify-project
description: Postify is a learning project built using Laravel 12, Inertia.js, and Vue 3 to explore modern full-stack development with a seamless SPA-like experience. It includes features like posts, likes, and comments to understand real-world application structure.
summary: 该项目是一个使用Laravel 12、Inertia.js和Vue 3构建的学习型全栈应用，名为Postify。它通过实现帖子、点赞和评论等功能，探索现代全栈开发及类单页应用的无缝体验。
